---
title: "NeuralGraph.tsx"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/src/tools/pennyone/vis/components/NeuralGraph.tsx"
loc: 400
complexity: 43
logic_score: 0.50
style_score: 1.00
intel_score: 3.10
overall_score: 1.20
---

## Intent
React component rendering NeuralGraph with 43 logic branches. It exists to provide a responsive interface element for real-time telemetry. Its role in the system is to project background Daemon activity into the visual Sovereign HUD plane.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 0.5/10
- **Style [S]**: 1.0/10
- **Intel [I]**: 3.1/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 111 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [useMemo](file://react)
- [useRef](file://react)
- [useState](file://react)
- [useEffect](file://react)
- [*](file://three)
- [useFrame](file://@react-three/fiber)
- [useThree](file://@react-three/fiber)
- [extend](file://@react-three/fiber)
- [Html](file://@react-three/drei)
- [useTexture](file://@react-three/drei)
- [shaderMaterial](file://@react-three/drei)
- [*](file://d3-force-3d)
- [*](file://gsap)

### Exports
- `PulseMaterial`
- `FresnelMaterial`
- `tempObject`
- `tempColor`
- `SelectionHighlight`
- `materialRef`
- `FresnelAura`
- `materialRef`
- `logicVal`
- `isToxic`
- `NeuralLink`
- `materialRef`
- `points`
- `geometry`
- `geo`
- `SpriteIcon`
- `odinTexture`
- `alfredTexture`
- `orphanTexture`
- `texture`
- `p`
- `spriteRef`
- `NeuralGraph`
- `NeuralGraph`
- `useThree`
- `sphereMeshRef`
- `tetraMeshRef`
- `simReady`
- `hovered`
- `selectedNode`
- `trajectories`
- `useMemo`
- `fallback`
- `files`
- `nodes`
- `nodeMap`
- `linkList`
- `usedIds`
- `pathStr`
- `orphans`
- `getLogScale`
- `fetchTrajectories`
- `res`
- `data`
- `orphans`
- `radius`
- `oCount`
- `theta`
- `map`
- `layers`
- `currentMesh`
- `scale`
- `isHovered`
- `isSelected`
- `p`
- `nodeMatrix`
- `handleNodeClick`
- `targetPos`
- `validLinks`
